spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1185 Interesting about the line Brook used for his song, it feels like a flashback to the places the Strawhats have visited in recent arcs. The final lines are also interesting; they might predict that Elbaf could be completely destroyed, forcing everyone to flee.

misc.text: Pace (@PacemanOP) Upcoming Blue Lock KV featuring Isagi & Kaiser. Isagi sits with the ball and a confident grin, while Kaiser stands behind him with his trademark smug look.
